search.query: `sandfly_search_sshkeys` event_type=ssh_zone_details | dedup ssh_zone_details.id | spath output=aaa_zone path=ssh_zone_details | mvexpand aaa_zone | spath input=aaa_zone | fields - ssh_zone_details | eval description=if(isnull(description) OR len(description)==0, "<none>", description) | table id name description hosts_count permitted_keys_count violation_host_count modification_date create_date | sort id | rename id as "Zone ID" | rename name as "Zone Name" | rename description as "Description" | rename hosts_count as "Zone Hosts" | rename permitted_keys_count as "Permitted Keys" | rename violation_host_count as "Violation Hosts" | rename modification_date as "Last Modified" | rename create_date as "Created Date"
